items.title: Opting for continuity, Raptors expected to offer extensions to Webster, Rajakovic
items.blurb: Opting for continuity, Raptors expected to offer extensions to Webster, Rajakovic — It’s expected that both general manager Bobby Webster and head coach Darko Rajakovic will be offered contract extensions in the coming weeks, Michael Grange has learned. He breaks it down here.

items.title: Raptors GM Webster reflects on 2025-26 season, weighs in on off-season plans
items.blurb: Raptors GM Webster reflects on 2025-26 season, weighs in on off-season plans — Watch the entire year-end press conference from Toronto Raptors GM Bobby Webster, looking back on a good season of growth, a 7-game first round playoff series, and also touches on summer plans.

items.title: Webster, Raptors’ off-season plan is simple: ‘More, better players’
items.blurb: Webster, Raptors’ off-season plan is simple: ‘More, better players’ — Toronto Raptors GM Bobby Webster discusses the team’s outlook heading into the offseason, saying that dipping into the luxury tax is always a possibility for a contending squad, but that the Raptors are still looking to bolster their overall talent.

items.title: How does Raptors’ front office navigate off-season roster questions?
items.blurb: How does Raptors’ front office navigate off-season roster questions? — NBA front office insider Bobby Marks joins The JD Bunkis Podcast and delves into the Toronto Raptors’ roster and the different directions that the front office can go to improve the team, including through trade.

items.title: Raptors coach Darko Rajakovic already looking ahead to challenge of next season
items.blurb: Raptors coach Darko Rajakovic already looking ahead to challenge of next season — If 46 wins and a playoff spot is the benchmark, the room for error for the Raptors is shrinking. Coach Darko Rajakovic said he’s up for the challenge, writes Michael Grange.

items.title: ‘It’s about making simple plays’: What Rajakovic learned in playoff setting
items.blurb: ‘It’s about making simple plays’: What Rajakovic learned in playoff setting — Raptors head coach Darko Rajakovic talks about what he and the team learned from their first taste of playoff basketball together, and why it’s all about executing the fundamentals of the game at a higher level.

items.title: How Raptors’ Rajakovic thinks Barnes can take another step this summer
items.blurb: How Raptors’ Rajakovic thinks Barnes can take another step this summer — Raptors head coach Darko Rajakovic says Scottie Barnes is only scraping the surface of what he can become, says he’s at 58 per cent of his potential, and talks about the growth he can achieve this off-season, that will allow him to take another jump.

items.title: Raptors face several challenges in bid to maintain momentum in off-season
items.blurb: Raptors face several challenges in bid to maintain momentum in off-season — It was an enjoyable, refreshing season, but keeping the momentum rolling will be a tough needle to thread for the Raptors. Michael Grange looks at the situation for GM Bobby Webster.

items.title: ‘Doing everything with intent’: Walter focused on improving his game
items.blurb: ‘Doing everything with intent’: Walter focused on improving his game — Toronto Raptors guard Ja’Kobe Walter meets with the media at the team’s year-end media availability and discusses his first playoff experience and the things that he can do to further improve his game and his body for NBA basketball.

items.title: ‘Wanted to be out there with the guys’: Quickley on missing post-season
items.blurb: ‘Wanted to be out there with the guys’: Quickley on missing post-season — Toronto Raptors guard Immanuel Quickley meets with the media at the team’s year-end media availability and discusses the hamstring injury that kept him out of the playoffs, and what he will work on in his game in the off-season.

items.title: ‘Don’t ever want to leave’: RJ Barrett affirms commitment to Raptors
items.blurb: ‘Don’t ever want to leave’: RJ Barrett affirms commitment to Raptors — After cementing himself in Toronto Raptors lore with a season-saving shot in the playoffs, hometown hero RJ Barrett made it clear he doesn’t want to go anywhere.

items.title: Barrett on his Raptors future: ‘Want to be here the rest of my career’

items.title: Scottie Barnes, Raptors run out of road in season that exceeded expectations
items.blurb: Scottie Barnes, Raptors run out of road in season that exceeded expectations — The Toronto Raptors season is over, and by harsh NBA standards, there’s no cause to celebrate. But the challenges ahead will be easier to take on because the Raptors learned definitively that Scottie Barnes is a superstar. The word is out, writes Michael Grange.
